textPlain: Syntax looks very much like Liquid. I feel like that syntax is becoming a standard.

Good to know.Normally I'd use Spring Boot and get the batteries-included experience if I ever were to make web with Java.But I could totally imagine needing a pure, well-made, zero-deps template engine for custom jobs.I certainly have similar libraries in my bookmarks for other languages, like Haskell [1] and Rust [2].   [2]: https://crates.io/crates/minijinja
